summary: Groww is stepping up focus on wealth management and lending to reduce dependence on its core broking business, said cofounder and chief executive Lalit Keshre. summary: Akash Fundkar said the Centre has introduced a social security code for gig and platform workers, with a national social security board for their welfare. title: Microsoft, OpenAI reaffirm ties after $110 billion raise
summary: Microsoft and OpenAI, in a joint statement, have tried to calm speculation on any possible change in direction for OpenAI following its massive fundraise from Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank. Both firms reiterated their long-term commitment to shared AI development and responsible deployment.

title: ChatGPT crosses 900 million weekly users, 50 million paying subscribers: OpenAI's Nick Turley
summary: Per Turley, for many users, ChatGPT is their entry point into AI. They start with writing, building, doing research, planning trips, shopping, or getting tasks done. Turley added that as the number of people using ChatGPT rises, the system learns faster, resulting in quicker responses, greater relia

title: India’s semiconductor market to hit $103 billlion by 2030, fuelled by AI, EVs, and defence
summary: India’s semiconductor market is set to nearly double to $103bn by 2030, driven by AI, electric mobility and defence modernisation. Data centre capacity will jump from 1.5 GW to 9 GW, while the IndiaAI Mission exceeds GPU targets. Despite growth, the ecosystem still relies heavily on imports and face

title: Nvidia plans new chip to speed AI processing: WSJ
summary: Nvidia plans to launch a new processor to help OpenAI and other clients run AI systems faster and more efficiently. The chip is for “inference” computing and will debut at Nvidia’s GTC conference. It incorporates a design by startup Groq.

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman inks deal with Pentagon after break with Anthropic
summary: This deal allows OpenAI to deploy its models within the Pentagon’s classified network under strict safety guardrails. title: Anthropic vows lawsuit over Pentagon ban, slams 'intimidation'
summary: The ban, in the form of a "supply chain risk" designation, came after the company objected to its artificial intelligence technology being used for domestic mass surveillance and fully autonomous weapons.

title: SpaceX could seek IPO valuation of over $1.75 trillion: Bloomberg
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX plans a confidential initial public offering that could value the rocket and satellite firm above $1.75 trillion, Bloomberg reported. The filing may come in March, though timing could change. The report said a June IPO is likely, matching that schedule.

title: Trump orders US agencies to stop using Anthropic technology in clash over AI safety
summary: The Trump administration has ordered all U.S. government agencies to stop using artificial intelligence technology from Anthropic and imposed penalties on the company after a dispute over military access to its AI tools.
